servers.name: docs-preview
servers.command: uv run sphinx-autobuild docs docs/_build/html --port 5190 --watch factor_factory --watch docs

servers.name: tearsheet-preview
servers.description: Scaffold the demo showcase, run 01_load.py, then open the jellycell viewer.

servers.name: pytest-watch
servers.description: Re-run pytest focused on last-failed, first-failed, fail-fast.
